reference: Hello. If your husband has persistent symptoms despite antibiotics, he needs to see a physician for a thorough evaluation. The physician may order further tests to determine the cause of the fever, which may help in further appropriate management. Good luck.
text: Hello. If your husband has persistent symptoms despite antibiotics, he needs to see a physician for a thorough evaluation. The physician may order further tests to determine the cause of the fever, which may help in further appropriate management. Good luck.
